takeaways.decode: Aligned GAC changes decode total self CUDA time by 0.55% versus unaligned PaLU; largest recovered family: gemm.
takeaways.prefill: Aligned GAC changes prefill total self CUDA time by 0.71% versus unaligned PaLU; largest recovered family: gemm.
